quirks.name: AH Addict
quirks.description: Visits the AH twice as often. Sometimes goes to AH with nothing to sell.

quirks.name: Chatty Kathy
quirks.description: Initiates conversations with nearby players unprompted.

quirks.name: Completionist
quirks.description: Never abandons a quest. Picks up every available quest in a hub.

quirks.name: Scaredy Cat
quirks.description: Flees at 40% HP instead of 20%. Avoids mobs more than 1 level above.

quirks.name: Born Grinder
quirks.description: Prefers grinding to questing. Higher weight to stay in grind spots.

quirks.name: AFK Andy
quirks.description: Occasionally stops and does nothing for 1-5 minutes.

quirks.name: Speed Demon
quirks.description: Minimal loitering. Short vendor visits. Skips optional quests.

quirks.name: Wanderlust
quirks.description: Sometimes walks to a random point in the zone just to look around.

quirks.name: Pack Rat
quirks.description: Delays vendor visits. Accumulates more items before selling.

quirks.name: Social Butterfly
quirks.description: Seeks out other bots/players. Uses /wave, /hello emotes near others.

quirks.name: Leeroy Jenkins
quirks.description: Pulls extra mobs. Engages orange-level targets. Rarely flees.

quirks.name: Saver
quirks.description: Hoards gold aggressively. Rarely buys from AH. Plans for level 40 mount.
